findings.title: logseq/logseq
findings.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link:  http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: https://discuss.logseq.com/t/logseq-product-roadmap/34267

findings.title: getzep/graphiti
findings.description: Build Real-Time Knowledge Graphs for AI Agents

findings.title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
findings.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

findings.title: liuhuanyong/QASystemOnMedicalKG
findings.description: A tutorial and implement of disease centered Medical knowledge graph and qa system based on it。知识图谱构建，自动问答，基于kg的自动问答。以疾病为中心的一定规模医药领域知识图谱，并以该知识图谱完成自动问答与分析服务。

findings.title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
findings.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about (Multi-platform e.g., Codex are supported).

findings.title: athensresearch/athens
findings.description: Athens is no longer maintainted. Athens was an open-source, collaborative knowledge graph, backed by YC W21

findings.title: ownthink/KnowledgeGraphData
findings.description: 史上最大规模1.4亿中文知识图谱开源下载

findings.title: husthuke/awesome-knowledge-graph
findings.description: 整理知识图谱相关学习资料

findings.title: xerrors/Yuxi
findings.description: 结合知识库管理的 Agent Harness 平台。 An agent harness that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain v1 + Vue + FastAPI, support DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j 、MCP.

findings.title: varunshenoy/GraphGPT
findings.description: Extrapolating knowledge graphs from unstructured text using GPT-3 🕵️‍♂️

findings.title: zjunlp/DeepKE
findings.description: [EMNLP 2022] An Open Toolkit for Knowledge Graph Extraction and Construction

findings.title: qq547276542/Agriculture_KnowledgeGraph
findings.description: 农业知识图谱(AgriKG)：农业领域的信息检索，命名实体识别，关系抽取，智能问答，辅助决策

findings.title: npubird/KnowledgeGraphCourse
findings.description: 东南大学《知识图谱》研究生课程

findings.title: panaversity/learn-agentic-ai
findings.description: Learn Agentic AI using Dapr Agentic Cloud Ascent (DACA) Design Pattern and Agent-Native Cloud Technologies: OpenAI Agents SDK, Memory, MCP, A2A, Knowledge Graphs, Dapr, Rancher Desktop, and Kubernetes.

findings.title: FalkorDB/FalkorDB
findings.description: A super fast Graph Database uses GraphBLAS under the hood for its sparse adjacency matrix graph representation. Our goal is to provide the best Knowledge Graph for LLM (GraphRAG).

findings.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
findings.description: Local knowledge graph for Claude Code. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so Claude reads only what matters — 6.8× fewer tokens on reviews and up to 49× on daily coding tasks.

findings.title: yoheinakajima/instagraph
findings.description: Converts text input or URL into knowledge graph and displays

findings.title: OSU-NLP-Group/HippoRAG
findings.description: [NeurIPS'24] HippoRAG is a novel RAG framework inspired by human long-term memory that enables LLMs to continuously integrate knowledge across external documents. RAG + Knowledge Graphs + Personalized PageRank.

findings.title: jm199504/Financial-Knowledge-Graphs
findings.description: 小型金融知识图谱构建流程（neo4j / python / cypher / KG）

findings.title: rahulnyk/knowledge_graph
findings.description: Convert any text to a graph of knowledge. This can be used for Graph Augmented Generation or Knowledge Graph based QnA
